Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Requirements -> Entities -> API -> High Level Design -> Deep Dive

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 1. User should be able to input a start location and destination and get an estimated fare.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 2. User should be able to request a ride based on an estimate

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 3. Drivers should be able to accept/deny the ride request

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 4. Drivers should be able to navigte to pickup and drop off

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 1. low latency matching - less than 1 minute to match rider to driver

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 2. consistency for 1:1 rider to driver matching. Any given ride is matched to one rider

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 4. Handle high throughput (surges for peak hours), thousands of requests in a given region\
